hooks.command: cd D:/repos/vocab-practice-app && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git diff --cached --name-only | sed 's|.*/||' > /tmp/vc_files.txt; COUNT=$(wc -l < /tmp/vc_files.txt | tr -d ' '); NAMES=$(head -5 /tmp/vc_files.txt | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); if [ "$COUNT" -gt 5 ]; then EXTRA=$((COUNT-5)); NAMES="$NAMES (+$EXTRA more)"; fi; git commit -m "auto: $NAMES"
